channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: My doctor keeps focusing on my weight. What other health metrics matter more?
item.description: Our Real Talk with a Doc columnist explains how to push back if your doctor's obsessed with weight loss. And what other health metrics matter more ins...

item.title: Takeaways from Hillary Clinton's deposition. And, Paramount outbids for Warner Bros.
item.description: Hillary Clinton says the questioning in a closed-door deposition with the House Oversight Committee's Epstein investigation was repetitive. And, Param...

item.title: Forget the State of the Union. What's the state of your quiz score?
item.description: What's the state of your union, quiz-wise? Find out!

item.title: A team of midlife cheerleaders in Ukraine refuses to let war defeat them
item.description: Ukrainian women in their 50s and 60s say they've embraced cheerleading as a way to cope with the extreme stress and anxiety of four years of Russia's ...

item.title: As the U.S. celebrates its 250th birthday, many Latinos question whether they belong
item.description: Many U.S.-born Latinos feel afraid and anxious amid the political rhetoric. Still, others wouldn't miss celebrating their country

item.title: Pakistan defence minister says country in 'open war' with Afghanistan after strikes
item.description: The latest attacks by Pakistan follow months of clashes between the two countries. despite agreeing to a fragile ceasefire in October.

item.title: JFK stowaway arrested after allegedly sneaking onto another flight, sources say
item.description: A woman convicted of stowing away on a flight out of JFK Airport in 2024 has allegedly done it again, this time at Newark Airport, sources say.

item.title: Why Trump means the Cuban Revolution faces its biggest threat yet
item.description: Will a worsening internal crisis create the conditions for the Cuban Revolution to unravel from within?

item.title: Pakistan declares "open war" with Afghanistan as airstrikes rock Kabul
item.description: Pakistan bombed major Afghan cities and declared "open war" after Afghanistan's Taliban rulers claimed an unprecedented aerial attack on Islamabad.

item.title: U.S. clears some diplomatic staff to leave Israel amid tension with Iran
item.description: As Trump leaves the threat of war on the table amid nuclear talks with Iran, the State Department urges Americans to "consider leaving Israel" while t...

item.title: What we know after latest escalation in Pakistan-Afghanistan tensions
item.description: Bombings by Pakistan are the most significant development in tensions between the two neighbours - though the physical impact remains unclear.

item.title: At least 55 Ghanaians killed in Russia-Ukraine war, minister says
item.description: This is the highest number of confirmed casualties from a single African country in the Ukraine-Russia war.

item.title: Former US diplomat sentenced to life for abusing two girls in Burkina Faso
item.description: He used the girls' mother's life-threatening illness as an opportunity to demand sex, said the US Office of Public Affairs.

item.title: Trump heads to Texas, where 3 supporters are battling it out in the Senate Republican primary
item.description: President Donald Trump is heading to Texas, his first trip after his State of the Union address. The Republican president plans to talk Friday about h...

item.title: The Trump administration is detaining and questioning refugees already admitted to the US
U.S. offers $10 million for capture of cartel bosses "The Frog" and "Achilles"
item.description: The U. S. is offering $5 million each for information on Rene Arzate Garcia and his brother Alfonso Arzate Garcia.

item.title: How Americans plan to use their bigger tax refunds this year
item.description: Early tax refund data shows the typical check is so far 14% higher than a year ago. Here's what Americans are planning to do with the money.

item.title: Deadly shooting in Cuban waters highlights obsessions with counter-revolution as US pressure mounts
